bracu_official.title: BRAC University Law Graduate Awarded Prestigious Joint Doctoral Scholarship Between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University Law graduate has been awarded a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship from the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney. This achievement highlights the academic excellence of BRAC University alumni.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law alumni association’s new executive committee takes charge for 2026–2028 term
bracu_official.summary: The new executive committee for the BRAC University law alumni association has officially commenced its term, which will run from 2026 to 2028. This marks a new phase of leadership for the alumni community.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University hosts workshops on case solving, strategic decision-making and ai
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University recently hosted a series of workshops focused on enhancing skills in case solving, strategic decision-making, and artificial intelligence. These events provided valuable learning opportunities for participants.

bracu_official.title: Last Date of Payment for Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: Students are reminded that 27 June is the last date for payment for the Summer 2026 semester. Please ensure all fees are paid by this deadline to avoid any issues.

bracu_official.title: Ashura (Muharram)*-University closed
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University will remain closed on 26 June in observance of Ashura (Muharram). All academic and administrative activities will be suspended on this day.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: A notice of award has been issued for B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2. Further details can be found in the official announcement.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1
bracu_official.summary: A notice of award has been issued for B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1. Please refer to the official document for complete information.

bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: A general recruitment notice has been published by BRAC University. Interested candidates are encouraged to review the details and application procedures.

bracu_official.title: LLB Final Exam Schedule: Spring 2026
bracu_official.summary: The final examination schedule for the LLB program for Spring 2026 has been released. Students should check the schedule carefully for their respective exam dates and times.

bracu_official.title: Mid-Term Exams week
bracu_official.summary: An announcement regarding the upcoming Mid-Term Exams week has been made. Students should prepare accordingly for their examinations.

bracu_official.title: Final Examinations
bracu_official.summary: A general notice concerning final examinations has been issued. Further details regarding the schedule and guidelines will be provided closer to the date.
